stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP file 4.1.
A single-engined Class B aeroplane, with the following wind component limitations, takes-off from an airport with RWY 02/20. What is the most favourable runway and the maximum allowed wind velocity if the wind direction during take-off is 330°?

Crosswind component limit: 13 kt
Headwind component limit: 30 kt
Tailwind component limit: 10 kt
